description: Send messages, manage channels, and read message history on a team communication platform.

operations.name: send-notification
operations.description: Send a message to one or more recipients or a channel.

recipients.description: One or more member references (member_hash + display_name). At least one recipient or channel must be specified.

channel.description: Channel identifier (e.g., channel name or ID). If provided, message is sent to the channel. If null, sent as direct message to recipients.

message.description: The message content. Plain text. The provider may format for its platform.

urgency.description: Hint to the provider about delivery priority. Interpretation is provider-specific (e.g., high may trigger a direct message instead of a channel post).

sent.description: Whether the message was successfully sent.

error.description: Error description if sent is false.

operations.name: create-channel
operations.description: Create a named channel and optionally invite members.

channel_name.description: Desired channel name. Provider may normalize (e.g., lowercase, replace spaces with hyphens).

members.description: Members to invite to the channel after creation.

private.description: Whether the channel should be private (visible only to invited members).

created.description: Whether the channel was successfully created.

channel_name.description: The actual channel name as created (may differ from requested name due to normalization).

members_failed.description: Array of { member_hash, display_name, reason } for members who could not be invited.

error.description: Error description if created is false.

operations.name: archive-channel
operations.description: Archive an existing channel, making it read-only.

archived.description: Whether the channel was successfully archived.

error.description: Error description if archived is false.

operations.name: restore-channel
operations.description: Unarchive a previously archived channel, restoring it to active use.

restored.description: Whether the channel was successfully restored.

error.description: Error description if restored is false.

operations.name: read-channel-history
operations.description: Read messages from a channel since a given timestamp.

channel_id.description: Platform-specific channel identifier to read from.

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Returns messages after this time. If null, returns recent messages (provider-defined window, typically last 24 hours or last 100 messages).

messages.description: Array of { author, timestamp, content, message_id } objects, ordered chronologically.

has_more.description: Whether more messages exist beyond what was returned.

error.description: Error description if messages could not be retrieved.

operations.name: invite-to-channel
operations.description: Invite one or more members to an existing channel.

members.description: Members to invite to the channel.

failed.description: Array of { member_hash, display_name, reason } for members who could not be invited.

error.description: Error description if the operation failed entirely.
